column1: # World corpus input manifest. One row per Geofabrik PBF.
#   iso2    — ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 (or ad-hoc tag for multi-country dumps like GCC)
#   source  — always 'osm' for this build (OA was deferred — see notes)
#   url     — IMMUTABLE Geofabrik dated snapshot URL. Must be of the form
#             *-latest.osm.pbf URLs are forbidden because they mutate.
#   date    — snapshot date YYYY-MM-DD (must match the YYMMDD in url)
#   bytes   — expected Content-Length, used as a coarse pre-flight check
# SHA-256s are NOT in this file. They live in manifest_input.lock.json,
# which is generated on the first run of build.sh and then committed.
# build.sh refuses to consume any download whose SHA-256 doesn't match the lock.

column6: russia (root snapshot, not under a continent subdir)
israel-and-palestine (PBF shared; tag IL, bbox-classify into IL/PS post-extract)
GCC bundle (SA AE KW BH OM QA); bbox-classify post-extract
us-northeast (only NE region; fully reproducible subset)
